description: Added Model drift support and worked with distributed file systems to run jobs on EMR cluster with Spark in Streamflux

Conducted a lecture for Ph.D. scholars on algorithms used in numerical analysis

Programmed data ingestion, cloud connections to read/write data in Azure blobs
Engineered end-to-end software feature creation, deployment and management in TrialRun
Performed vulnerability fixes, and handled user privileges and requests
Implemented automated scripts for data ingestion and migration
Mentored two undergraduate students on development of a Book Recommendation System project and Local Image Finder application
Provided technical guidance, code reviews, and architectural design support for student projects
Helped with the complete project lifecycle, from ideation to deployment
